scenario: Aurora Bank runs 80 tasks per loan application as a parallel multi-instance subprocess in Camunda 8.8. The risk team wants to terminate any still-active instances and complete the multi-instance body as soon as 50% or more of the audit instances have finished, so they need a FEEL completionCondition that uses the BPMN multi-instance properties.
question: Which FEEL completionCondition expresses 'complete when 50% or more of the instances already completed'?

options.text: = numberOfActiveInstances / numberOfInstances >= 0.5 evaluates true once at least half of the originally created instances remain active in the multi-instance body
= numberOfTerminatedInstances / numberOfInstances >= 0.5 evaluates true once at least half of the created instances have been terminated by the engine at runtime
= numberOfCompletedInstances / numberOfActiveInstances >= 0.5 evaluates true once the completed count reaches half of the currently active instances at evaluation
= numberOfCompletedInstances / numberOfInstances >= 0.5 evaluates true once at least half of the originally created instances of the multi-instance body have completed

a.text: Incorrect. numberOfActiveInstances counts instances still running, not those that have completed, so this expression triggers on the active share and does not match the documented 50%-completed rule for the multi-instance body.

b.text: Incorrect. numberOfTerminatedInstances counts instances ended early rather than those that completed successfully, so the ratio does not express the 'already completed' threshold the team wants to enforce.

c.text: Incorrect. Dividing completed by active uses a moving denominator that shrinks as instances finish, so the ratio does not match 50% of the originally created instances defined by numberOfInstances.

d.text: Correct. The docs give exactly this completionCondition as the example for 'complete the multi-instance body when 50% or more of the instances already completed', dividing numberOfCompletedInstances by numberOfInstances.

explanation: BPMN multi-instance bodies expose numberOfInstances, numberOfActiveInstances, numberOfCompletedInstances, and numberOfTerminatedInstances for use in the completionCondition, and the 50% threshold is expressed as numberOfCompletedInstances / numberOfInstances >= 0.5.
